_doc: Kill-switch + safety config for Tradovate auto-trader. Edit to control the bot from anywhere.

active_contract._note: Update contract_id + contract_name before rollover. Next: MNQU6 (Sep), MNQZ6 (Dec)

_safety_notes: enabled=false ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ bot ignores ALL signals (still logs to journal)
max_qty caps quantity per order regardless of what Pine sends
daily_cap is read from journal; bot stops after N orders/day
symbol_whitelist: only tickers whose root matches will execute
active_contract: maps ticker_root to a specific Tradovate contract_id
skip_on_danger: if alert has danger=1, skip execution (still logs)
market_hours_only: skip outside CME GLOBEX RTH (will be CME-aware later)
